testcase.name: test_get_product_by_id
test_adjust_inventory
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_moego_phase4_pos_crm.py:159: in test_adjust_inventory assert data["previous_quantity"] == 20 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'previous_quantity'

testcase.name: test_get_transaction
test_inventory_deduction_after_sale

testcase.name: test_full_pos_workflow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_moego_phase4_pos_crm.py:562: in test_full_pos_workflow assert create_res.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
